# MuleSoft CloudHub 2.0

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of CloudHub 2.0 documentation.
> See [CloudHub 2.0 llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cloudhub-2/llms-full.txt) for all the CloudHub 2.0 documentation in one file.

## Content

- [CloudHub 2.0 API Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cloudhub-2/ch2-api-reference.md)
- [CloudHub 2.0 API](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cloudhub-2/ch2-api.md)
